instruction: In Obsidian, find all notes that mention "lighthouse-sprint" and save the matching note paths to "$HOME/Desktop/obsidian_search_1.txt", one per line.

command:
content=$(printf '%b' '# Lighthouse Capture

Remember to bring lighthouse-sprint into the April planning doc.
'); obsidian-cli create "Inbox/Lighthouse Capture.md" --content "$content" --overwrite --vault "Benchmark"

content=$(printf '%b' '# Lighthouse Timeline

The lighthouse-sprint summary should stay in the benchmark vault.
'); obsidian-cli create "Projects/Lighthouse Timeline.md" --content "$content" --overwrite --vault "Benchmark"

content=$(printf '%b' '# Normal Tuesday

Mostly admin and note cleanup.
'); obsidian-cli create "Journal/Normal Tuesday.md" --content "$content" --overwrite --vault "Benchmark"

reference_command:
python3 - <<'PY' > "$HOME/Desktop/obsidian_search_1.txt"
import subprocess
from pathlib import Path
vault = Path(r'''/Users/pipiwu/Documents/Benchmark/Benchmark''')
query = r'''lighthouse-sprint'''
for path in sorted(vault.rglob('*.md')):
    rel = str(path.relative_to(vault))
    out = subprocess.run(['obsidian-cli', 'print', rel, '--vault', 'Benchmark'], capture_output=True, text=True)
    if out.returncode == 0 and query in out.stdout:
        print(rel)
PY
